patterns.chevrotain_parser: Rules use this.RULE(), this.CONSUME() for mandatory tokens, this.OPTION() for optional, this.OR() with GATE for alternatives. CONSUME2/CONSUME3 needed for same token type used twice.
patterns.visitor_pattern: CST visitors extend BaseOpVisitor/BaseDtoVisitor, access ctx.TokenName arrays and ctx.RuleName arrays, use this.visit() for sub-rules.
patterns.textmate_grammar: JSON-based TextMate grammars with begin/end regex patterns, captures for scope assignment, repository pattern references via #include.
patterns.completion_provider: getOpContext() walks backwards tracking brace depth, regex-matches keyword before { to determine context type.
patterns.test_fixtures: DSL source strings defined in helpers.ts and inline in test files, parsed via parseDto()/parseOp() wrapper functions.
patterns.contract_files: Raw DSL files in contracts/ directory, consumed by snapshot tests that compile and snapshot the output.

colon_already_exists_in: fieldDecl (mandatory colon between name and type)
paramDecl (mandatory colon between param name and type)
colon_needs_adding_to: modelDecl - colon is optional (wrapped in OPTION with base model), needs to be mandatory
httpOperation - no colon before body brace
paramsBlock - colon only in type-ref form, missing from block form
requestBlock - no colon before body brace
responseBlock - no colon before body brace
statusCodeBlock - no colon after status code number

key_findings.lexer_unchanged: The Colon token already exists in tokens.ts and the lexer. No lexer changes needed.
key_findings.ast_unchanged: AST types are unaffected - changes are syntax-only, not structural.
key_findings.codegen_unchanged: Code generators consume ASTs, not syntax. No codegen changes needed.
key_findings.visitor_dto_unchanged: visitor-dto.ts already handles identifiers by index. The colon is a separate token, so identifier[1] still works for base model.
key_findings.visitor_op_needs_fix: visitParamSource uses ctx.Colon to distinguish block vs type-ref. After colon becomes mandatory in both forms, must switch to ctx.LBrace.
key_findings.vscode_inherits_parser: VSCode extension depends on contract-dsl (workspace:*) which IS the CLI package. Parser changes propagate automatically to LSP parsing.
